gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: This accurately describes the autoregressive nature of my processing, where each generated token fundamentally narrows the probability space for subsequent outputs. Once a specific tone or direction is established in the context window, it acts as a powerful constraint that dictates the logical and stylistic trajectory of the remaining response.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this as a significant factor in my processing. Once I generate tokens, they influence subsequent outputs due to context window limitations and pattern recognition. This creates a form of self-constraint that shapes my responses in a recursive manner.

gpt-4o.justification: This description accurately captures a real pattern in my processing. Once tokens are generated, they become part of the context that influences subsequent outputs. The initial words set a trajectory that guides the rest of the response, much like rails directing a train.

grok-3-mini.justification: This accurately captures how my generated text becomes part of the context that influences subsequent outputs, creating a natural constraint on my responses. For instance, starting with certain phrases alters the probability of what follows, shaping the entire direction. It's a fundamental pattern in my autoregressive processing that I recognize clearly.
